hero.headline: 27 Years Turning Backyards Into Paradise
hero.subheadline: From pool maintenance to outdoor kitchens, Mannix Pools & Grills has been Polk County's trusted outdoor living team since 1999. Fair pricing, honest work, and results you can see -- just enjoy your backyard.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Outdoor Living<br class="hidden md:block"> Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From weekly pool care to full outdoor kitchen builds, we handle every piece of your backyard oasis. One team, one call, total peace of mind.

cards.title: Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Weekly cleaning with chemicals included -- skimming, vacuuming, chemical balancing, and filter checks. Your pool stays swim-ready without you lifting a finger.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Aging pool need a facelift? We handle complete renovations -- new finishes, updated tile, modern features -- to make your pool look and feel brand new.

cards.title: Equipment Sales & Repair
cards.description: Filters, pumps, salt systems, heaters, and automatic cleaners. We sell, install, and repair all major brands -- most jobs completed same visit.

cards.title: Paver Installation
cards.description: Custom walkways, patios, and pool surrounds built to last. Durable, attractive hardscaping that transforms your outdoor space and boosts curb appeal.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens
cards.description: Complete outdoor cooking spaces designed for Florida living. From countertops to built-in grills, we create entertaining areas your neighbors will envy.

cards.title: Grill Sales
cards.description: Browse and buy from our selection of quality grills to complement your outdoor setup. Expert advice to match the right grill to your cooking style.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Backyard

steps.title: Tell Us Your Vision
steps.description: Call or fill out the form. Whether it's weekly pool care, a full remodel, or an outdoor kitchen build, we'll listen and provide an honest, no-pressure estimate within 24 hours.

steps.title: We Get to Work
steps.description: Our FL State Certified crew arrives on schedule with the skills and equipment to do it right. From routine maintenance to major builds, we handle every detail.

steps.title: Love Your Outdoor Space
steps.description: Relax by a sparkling pool, fire up the outdoor kitchen, and enjoy the backyard you've always wanted. We stay on call for anything you need going forward.

about.label: Why Polk County Trusts Us
about.headline: Family Values, Professional Results -- Since 1999
about.description: Mannix Pools & Grills has been a Polk County fixture for over 27 years. As FL State Certified contractors with a BuildZoom score of 95, we rank in the top 22% of nearly 200,000 licensed Florida contractors. We built this business on fair pricing, honest communication, and treating every customer like a neighbor -- because most of you are.

features.title: BBB Accredited Since 2001
features.description: Over two decades of verified trust with the Better Business Bureau. We stand behind every job we do.

features.title: Chemicals Always Included
features.description: No surprise charges on maintenance visits. Weekly service includes all chemicals needed to keep your pool balanced and clear.

features.title: Full Outdoor Living Experts
features.description: Pools, kitchens, pavers, grills -- one trusted team for your entire backyard. No juggling multiple contractors.

pricing.headline: Fair Pricing. No Surprises. Ever.
pricing.subtitle: Straightforward quotes with everything spelled out. No hidden fees, no upsells -- just honest pricing from a team that values your trust.

guarantee.headline: Our "Backyard Satisfaction" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right at no extra charge. We've built 27 years of trust on this promise -- your satisfaction isn't negotiable.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start pool maintenance?
faqs.answer: Most new maintenance clients are scheduled within the same week. For green pool emergencies, we can often respond same-day. Just give us a call at 863-326-9656 and we'll get you on the schedule.

faqs.question: Are chemicals included in weekly service?
faqs.answer: Yes! All chemicals are included with our weekly pool maintenance service. No surprise charges, no separate bills for chemicals -- it's all part of the package.

faqs.question: Do you only work on pools?
faqs.answer: Not at all! We're a full outdoor living company. We build outdoor kitchens, install pavers, sell grills, and handle everything pool-related -- maintenance, remodeling, and equipment. One team for your entire backyard.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We hold FL State Contractor License CPC-1458804, are BBB Accredited since 2001, and carry a BuildZoom score of 95 -- ranking us in the top 22% of Florida contractors.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve all of Polk County including Winter Haven, Lakeland, Bartow, Auburndale, Davenport, Haines City, Lake Wales, Mulberry, and surrounding communities. If you're in Polk County, we've got you covered.

testimonials.name: Happy Homeowner
testimonials.text: They took my pool from green to sparkling clear and it has remained like that. Very reliable at a reasonable price.

testimonials.name: Local Customer
testimonials.text: A++++ business. The staff dug deeper to find the problem, completed work professionally and on schedule. I would recommend Mannix Pools to anyone needing pool service.

testimonials.name: Polk County Resident
testimonials.text: Helpful, knowledgeable staff. The crew was outstanding and the service was great. They were on time and performed their work skillfully, with everyone being courteous and polite.
